rationale: Elec. Code §254.0912 governs campaign finance report contents for statewide officeholders and legislators. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: In addition to the contents required by Sections 254.031 and 254.091, each report by a holder of a statewide office in the executive branch or a legislative office must include the contents prescribed by Section 254.0612.
_note: No conflict; cited rule concerns campaign finance reporting, unrelated to homestead exemption.
